## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs update

## Validation

- [ ] Tested manually on ChatGPT web page(s)
- [ ] Confirmed markdown output formatting

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is focused
- [ ] Docs/README updated if needed
- [ ] No unrelated changes
